passage.title: A Day with Passive Voice Part 1 — Present & Past
passage.text: This book is read by me. This work is done by him. This letter was written by her. The food is cooked by mother. This house was built by my grandfather. This song is sung by her. This question was asked by me. This photo is taken by me. This decision was taken by the team. This letter is delivered by the postman.
passage.hindiTranslation: यह किताब मेरे द्वारा पढ़ी जाती है। यह काम उसके द्वारा किया जाता है। यह letter उसके द्वारा लिखा गया। खाना माँ के द्वारा बनाया जाता है। यह घर मेरे दादा जी ने बनाया था। यह गाना उसके द्वारा गाया जाता है। यह प्रश्न मेरे द्वारा पूछा गया। यह फोटो मेरे द्वारा खींची जाती है। यह decision team के द्वारा लिया गया। यह पत्र डाकिये द्वारा पहुँचाया जाता है।

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "This book is read..."?
options: This photo is taken by me.
This mistake was made by the students.
This work is done by him.
This book is read by me.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: This book is read by me.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "This book is read by me."

comprehensionQuestions.question: What does the passage say about: "This work is done..."?
options: This decision was taken by the team.
These awards are given every year.
This letter was written by her.
This work is done by him.
comprehensionQuestions.answer: This work is done by him.
comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "This work is done by him."

comprehensionQuestions.explanation: Stated in the passage: "This letter was written by her."
